summary: auth logout must delete the persisted cookies.json jar, not only the credential token fields — otherwise the browser session is re-seeded on the next request.
reason: Cookie-auth CLIs persist the live session into an on-disk cookie jar (cookies.json) in addition to the credential store. The generated logout path only calls ClearTokens(), so LoadCookieJar() keeps re-sending the old Jimmy John's session after 'Credentials cleared'. Added client.ClearCookieJar() and call it from logout.
